title: Lavender Mist
description: Soft lavender tones with a gentle misty shimmer—lightweight, calming, and perfect for everyday elegance.

title: Emerald Swirl
description: Rich emerald color with a smooth swirling vibe—bold, luxurious, and effortlessly eye-catching.

title: Rose Chrome
description: Shiny rose chrome finish with a reflective glow—trendy, stylish, and perfect for standout nails.

title: Sky Gloss
description: Soft sky blue shade with a glossy smooth finish—fresh, clean, and modern trending style.

title: Nude Shine
description: Natural nude tone with a shiny polished finish—simple, elegant, and always trending.

title: Midnight Plum
description: Deep plum shade with a glossy finish—bold, dramatic, and perfect for trendy nail looks.
